pi_items.source: Task description specifies creating a NEW gridset named 'WebMercator512'

Task description specifies EPSG:3857 (Web Mercator). EPSG:3857 is the standard Web Mercator projection used by Google Maps, OpenStreetMap, Bing, and all major web mapping services (https://epsg.io/3857)

Task description specifies tile dimensions 512 x 512 pixels. GeoWebCache documentation confirms tile dimensions can range from 16 to 2048 pixels (https://docs.geoserver.org/maintain/en/user/geowebcache/webadmin/gridsets.html), so 512 is valid
Task description specifies tile dimensions 512 x 512 pixels
Task description specifies 'Add at least 5 zoom levels'
Setup script (setup_geoserver.sh lines 114, 185) creates PostGIS table 'ne_countries' in workspace 'ne', making the layer name 'ne:ne_countries'
Task description requires 'Ensure image/png is an allowed tile image format'. PNG is a standard raster image format for tile caching

privileged_info_summary: All task metadata claims are verified and correct. The task configures GeoWebCache tile caching for the 'ne:ne_countries' layer using the Natural Earth 1:110m countries dataset (real, public data from naturalearthdata.com). The configuration uses GeoServer 2.25.2 with PostGIS 3.3 (PostgreSQL 15). The gridset 'WebMercator512' uses EPSG:3857 (Web Mercator projection standard for web mapping), 512x512 pixel tiles, minimum 5 zoom levels, and PNG image format. The layer is created from the ne_110m_admin_0_countries shapefile, imported as the 'ne_countries' table in PostGIS, and published as 'ne:ne_countries' in GeoServer.
